CAUSE CALLED, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, MELVIN L IND/DBA S & S MUFFLER SMITH, TOM IND/DBA TOM'S AUTO REPAIR POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: ONE BEND-PAK LIFT BP-12;ONE BEND-PACK BENDER,ONE LARGE DIE 3", AND ONE ACCESSORIES, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $3,900.00, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $8,267.24 DAMAGES, $1,175.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $269.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,711.24, INTEREST $277.98. TOTAL JUDGMENT $9989.22. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
STATUS CONFERENCE OF MAY-17-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
